comments.body: @cgwalters FWIW, we see `Error: error: opening repo: opendir(/proc/self/fd/3): No such file or directory` from time to time in the `ostree-rs-ext` tests (e.g. https://cirrus-ci.com/task/4684818032623616 ). It usually goes away in a re-run.
